# fixture

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/fixture`

Package fixture is GOLC's canonical, capability-based fixture domain
model (CONTEXT D-08): GDTF-friendly rather than hard-wired to Open
Fixture Library's channel/mode shape, with every Capability.Range
normalized to the 0..1 range so the model stays protocol-agnostic (Art-
Net today, other protocols later). decode.go (FIXT-01/FIXT-02) is the
single strict-decode entrypoint every fixture source -- hand-authored
YAML today, the internal/fixture/ofl import path -- normalizes through,
so no second, independently-evolving validation path can exist.
